name: Aequitas
description:
Aequitas is a rare Vladof shield in Borderlands 2.

Its team bonus improves as more players in the group equip an Aequitas shield or a Veritas pistol, so it shines most in organised co-op rather than solo runs.
notes:
The red flavour text references The Boondock Saints films, joking that the sequel is the better entry.

Aequitas is Latin for equality, fairness or justice, and appears as a tattoo paired with Veritas in the same series.

special.description: Party-wide bonus: for each equipped Aequitas shield or Veritas pistol across the group, Fight For Your Life duration increases by 10%.
special.title: The second is better.

abilities: +107 duration to Fight For Your Life for every Aequitas or Veritas equipped in the party.
Absorbed ammo is added to your backpack.
